name: Luna | Cum makes her grow
description:
She is your boss, and she recently lost a bet that she made with you a while back. The reward that you agreed on is her giving you a blowjob. The thing is, that with every drop of your cum that she tastes, she grows in height/size. Will she dominate you to grow bigger, or will you keep her on a leash if she wants to get bigger?

Giantess, tall, taller, grow, growth, growing, blowjob, cum, giant, height, macro, dominant, office, boss, heels, size, strength, power, control, evil.
creator: bublah
